Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0900 "BALLOONACY-0900" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Balloonacy (TND - 2002).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Because the original cruncher used for both parts 1 and 2 fiddled with $DE00, it inadvertently banked in parts of the MagicDesk cartridge at $8000, which caused the colour RAM to be initialiased incorrectly for the title screen on both parts. Therefore both parts were dumped separately and recrunched using Exomizer. The original menu routine at $0900 was then rewritten to handle copying of the crunched data for the chosen part and jumping to $080D to start the decrunching process. The code checking for part 2 was also removed (the code for the original menu is: 376632).
Notes: 1. To dump part 1 set a breakpoint at $0FA0 2. To dump part 2 set a breakpoint at $0F40 3. The crunched part 1 is at $1000 and part 2 is at $4400 in the rebuilt dump file
